subcodes.first_line: O Ardeshir! Praise be unto God that from every direction endless confirmations are evident and heavenly favors are manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اردشیر الحمد لله از جمیع جهات تایید بی پایان نمایان و الطاف آسمانی فارسیان
subcodes.subjects: @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
